videos.headline: Rutgers' Eric Rogers takes back 52-yard pick-six
videos.description: Eric Rogers picks off Howard quarterback Ja'Shawn Scroggins and takes it back for a pick-six.

videos.headline: Dymere Miller scores a TD for Rutgers

videos.headline: Athan Kaliakmanis connects with Samuel Brown V for 34-yard TD
